title: CCRAS Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Various Senior Research Fellow Posts
description: The Central Council for Research in Ayurvedic Sciences (CCRAS) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Senior Research Fellow Jobs. Candidates with MD/ MS, M.V.Sc, and M.Pharm can grab this chance and apply for the CCRAS Notification 2026 . Here are included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, and education details. applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
